title: Boat Rental in Tioman Island: Costs, Tips & Best Boats 2026
html:
Tioman Island, a protected marine park off Malaysia's east coast, offers some of the finest cruising waters in Southeast Asia. Renting a powerboat from Genting Village or Juara Bay typically costs from 90 OMR for a half-day outing. BoatHire24 connects you with verified skippers and private owners for your ideal day on the water.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Tioman Island?

You can rent a boat in Tioman Island from 40 OMR for a shared tour to over 250 OMR for a crewed motor yacht. Costs depend on boat size, duration, and whether you hire a captain. A small motorboat for four hours typically costs 80-120 OMR, while a full-day catamaran charter for up to ten people runs 200-300 OMR.

  • Shared snorkelling tour (half-day, per person): from 40 OMR
  • Small motorboat (half-day, private, 4-6 guests): 80-120 OMR
  • Catamaran (full-day, up to 10 guests): 200-300 OMR
  • Crewed luxury yacht (full-day, up to 12 guests): 350-500 OMR

For the latest availability and accurate pricing, compare verified boat listings on yacht charter Tioman Island through BoatHire24's platform.

Where to set off in Tioman Island

Most boat rentals depart from the main jetty at Kampung Tekek, but other villages offer quieter launching points. The island's two main jetties are in Tekek and Genting, both with fuel and basic provisions. For a more secluded start, consider Juara Bay on the east coast, which has a small jetty and direct access to the open sea and Pulau Tulai (Coral Island), or Air Batang (ABC) beach, a popular base for budget charters and snorkelling trips. Mukut village in the south provides a gateway to remote dive sites like Tiger Reef.

Which boat to rent

Your choice of boat should match your group size and plan for the day.

  1. Rib or speedboat: best for fast transfers and short excursions, seating up to 6 guests, from 90 OMR half-day
  2. Axopar 28: a stylish centre-console for 8, ideal for island hopping and watersports, from 200 OMR half-day
  3. Small sailing catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 380): stable and fuel-efficient, sleeps 4-6 and perfect for day trips, from 250 OMR full-day
  4. Motor yacht (e.g. Azimut 50): luxury cruising for up to 12 guests, with cabins and a galley, from 500 OMR full-day

For a sporty yet affordable option, check the Olympic 490 listing on BoatHire24, which offers a nimble 15-footer ideal for small groups exploring the coves around Tioman.

When is the best season to rent a boat in Tioman Island?

The best time to charter is between March and October, when the northeast monsoon is quiet and the South China Sea is calm. High season runs from June to August, with steady north-westerly winds of 10-15 knots and excellent visibility. The monsoon period (November to February) brings heavy rain and rough seas, and many charters suspend operations. A local skipper advises: 'In the high season, the water around Pulau Tulai is like glass in the morning, but always check the local weather app for afternoon squalls.'

'The best snorkelling is during the high-season months of June to August, when the southerly winds keep the water clear around the marine park.'

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Tioman Island?

No formal licence is required to rent a small unpowered boat or a boat with a captain, but for self-drive powerboats you need a valid international boating licence or equivalent certification. The operator will confirm the exact requirements at the time of booking, as Malaysian regulations vary by vessel size and horsepower. For most tourists, chartering with a licensed skipper is the simplest and safest option.

At a glance

  • Price band: from 40 to 500 OMR per trip
  • Peak months: June, July, August
  • Typical trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Maximum guests: 12 on a crewed yacht
  • Currency: OMR (Omani Rial), prices are quoted in OMR for convenience

Questions about boat rental in Tioman Island

Can I fish from a charter boat in Tioman Island?

Yes, some charter operators offer fishing trips with basic tackle included, but you must check the marine park rules as some areas are no-fishing zones.

What is included in the rental price?

Most rentals include the boat, fuel for the agreed itinerary, and life jackets; full-day charters often include lunch and snorkelling gear.

Is it safe to rent a boat in Tioman Island in 2026?

Yes, provided you choose a verified operator on BoatHire24, all vessels are insured and skippers are experienced with local waters.

Can I anchor overnight on my boat charter?

Overnight stays are only permitted with prior arrangement and a dedicated cruising permit; most day charters return by sunset.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Tioman Island or list your own. For those considering adding their own vessel, list your boat on BoatHire24 to reach thousands of travellers planning their 2026 adventures in Tioman Island and beyond.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Tioman Island and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
